response.justification: The candidate has genuine technical breadth across roughly 17 years and recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which is directionally relevant. However, the role demands director-level strategic seniority, recognized AI expertise with shipped products or platforms, and demonstrated ability to advise enterprise customers on AI adoption — none of which is evidenced at the required depth or seniority. The AI involvement is concentrated in the most recent ~2 months of employment, and the career arc is that of a senior individual contributor rather than a technical strategist or influencer operating at principal/director scope.
strengths: 17+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, high-throughput microservices, and cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), demonstrating genuine full-stack and infrastructure depth
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework work, showing active engagement with agentic AI tooling in a production context
Founder of GISCollective and history of public workshops and conference talks (FOSS4G) indicate an ability to build independently and share technical knowledge externally
concerns: AI expertise is very recent (roughly 2 months in current role) with no prior track record of shipping AI-powered products or platforms at meaningful scale
No evidence of director-level scope: advising strategic enterprise customers, shaping organizational AI strategy, or influencing product roadmaps across engineering and business stakeholders

No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no published research, patents, or external recognition as an AI practitioner, which the role lists as preferred and is expected at principal/director level

key_factors.factor: Technical breadth and current AI tooling work
